title: Mandir: Gods Untouched
description:
After an excavation team goes missing during a mining excavation in the Naravalli mountains, Inspector Ashfaq is dispatched as the first responder to a site, where things quickly delve into chaos as a dark secret is unveiled and as the survivors quickly learn that not all old structures are places of devotion and not all gods like being disturbed...

Mandir Gods Untouched is a third person horror shooter experience where exploration, combat, and investigation collide in a place built not for worship, but for containment. As secrets surface and reality fractures, you will learn the cost of disturbing what was meant to remain sealed—because not all old structures are temples, and not all gods tolerate being awakened. 

DISCOVER THE TRUTH: 
Uncover traces of ancient rituals, forbidden prayers, and dark entities reawakened for a sinister purpose. Rites speaking of blood offerings, sealed mantras, and fear-driven practices meant to restrain forces beyond human control.

POWERS TO SURVIVE: 

As the containment fails, conventional weapons are no longer enough. Awaken unstable abilities  allowing you to bend time, enhance movement, and momentarily turn the chaos in your favor during combat. 

Descend into a place where darkness, silence, and sudden violence define every step forward. Survival demands caution, awareness, and the will to face what should have remained buried. 
As not all old structures are places of devotion. 
 
And some gods are best left undisturbed.....
description_short: A third-person horror shooter game set in a remote mountain temple, where you play as an Inspector investigating a lost excavation team, uncovering a hidden conspiracy, brutal rituals, and a supernatural force buried beneath ancient structures.
